description: Parameters safe for auto-tune exploration. Start small, expand after validation.

params.name: zero_damage_attack_penalty
params.role: Penalizes attacks predicted to deal 0 damage

params.name: ko_opponent_bonus
params.role: Bonus when attack can KO opponent active

params.name: winning_ko_bonus
params.role: Extra bonus when KO wins the game

params.name: boss_can_ko
params.role: Boss target bonus when our active can KO it

params.name: boss_ko_ex
params.role: Extra Boss bonus when KO target is ex

params.name: boss_low_hp
params.role: Boss target bonus for HP <= 60

params.name: boss_key_support
params.role: Boss target bonus for evolution_base/engine

params.name: to_active_can_ko
params.role: Switch target bonus when candidate can KO

params.name: to_active_can_damage
params.role: Switch target bonus when candidate can damage

params.name: alt_attacker_ko_score
params.role: Alternative attacker score when can KO

params.name: alt_attacker_damage_score
params.role: Alternative attacker score when can damage

params.name: energy_ready_bonus
params.role: Bonus for alternative attacker with enough energy

params.name: energy_not_ready_penalty
params.role: Penalty for alternative attacker without energy

params.name: ex_final_prize_end_penalty
params.role: Penalty for ending turn with ex active vs final prizes

params.name: ex_final_prize_retreat_boost
params.role: Boost for retreating ex when opponent near winning

params.name: avoid_retreat_losing_energy
params.role: Penalty for retreating when active has energy

params.name: win_condition_weight
params.role: Scale factor for plan progress in board evaluation

params.name: deck_critical_penalty
params.role: Penalty when deck count critically low

params.name: future_weight
params.role: Lookahead future value weight

params.name: threat_weight
params.role: Lookahead threat value weight

params.name: bellibolt_ability_enables_attack
params.role: Bellibolt ability bonus when 1 more energy enables attack

params.name: bellibolt_ability_charge
params.role: Bellibolt ability bonus for self-charge toward attack

params.name: bellibolt_ability_progress
params.role: Bellibolt ability bonus for progressing toward attack

params.name: voltorb_damage_increase
params.role: Energy attach bonus for Voltorb damage scaling

params.name: voltorb_ko_line
params.role: Energy attach bonus when reaching opponent KO threshold

params.name: bench_low_hp_penalty_per_copy
params.role: Penalty per existing copy of low-HP basic on bench

params.name: spread_threat_extra_penalty
params.role: Extra penalty when opponent has spread threat
